sources.publisher: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
sources.quote: Influenza (flu) is a contagious respiratory illness caused by influenza viruses that infect the nose, throat, and sometimes the lungs.

sources.publisher: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
sources.quote: Flu viruses spread mainly by droplets made when people with flu cough, sneeze, or talk.

factsExtracted.value: Spread mainly by droplets made when people with flu cough, sneeze, or talk.
